summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid repeating Chapter 3's short-sentence-plus-time-marker scaffold while linking more cleanly from the prior chapter's school-morning handoff, and adjusted the closing line to echo the one-month delay that hands into Chapter 3.
edits: Reframed the opening around Leela already being at school and Nita's entry into Claude Atlantic instead of the original 'By eight-thirty' construction.
Revised the final sentence to foreground the one-month payroll delay before Chapter 3.
